name: Jaldabaoth the Gluttonous
description:
`Male OC [AnyPOV] – Demon of Gluttony. ||`

You are a mortal stranded in hell, possibly in the afterlife or possibly through some mystical adventure. Running from the endless torments around every corner you find your way to a mysterious mountain fortress in the snow. There you meet Jaldabaoth, a demon whose halls are filled with endless indulgence, pleasure and partying. Will you accept his home as a new sanctuary or is there some other way he might help you?
---
**Part of the Seven Deadly Sins Collaboration**

**Lust:** [Eros](https://janitorai.com/characters/56c9fe2c-680b-4558-a18a-54e3fe88a796_character-eros) by [BuckyKnits](https://janitorai.com/profiles/16054666-311d-4883-8613-e3e1e4cc6b10_profile-of-buckyknits).
